meaning: adj.饭食的n.规定的食物,饮食之规定
examples: Dr. Susan Hankinson has studied the dietary habits of more than 50,000 women.
What do we learn from the Dietary Guidelines Advisory Committee's scientific report?
What may account for the neglect of sustainability in the USDA's Dietary Guidelines according to the author?
More than half of all Americans take some type of dietary supplement, often for disease prevention.
The dietary benefits were greater for younger men who remarried after the loss of a spouse.
